title: implement qat and weight sharing
author: kiratoyoshihara

data.description: Replaces the standard stack of transformer blocks with a single shared block applied recursively across layers.
Shares parameters across layers by reusing the same Transformer Block repeatedly.

novel_contributions: Single shared Transformer block applied recursively across layers
Quantization-aware training with symmetric INT8 fake quantization
Integration of QAT and parameter tying into train_gpt.py
